Diabetic Range – Franchise Available Across AP

Diabetic Range Pharma Franchise in Andhra Pradesh

Crasenim Pharma offers a pharma franchise for the diabetic range across Andhra Pradesh. Our Metsenim-G series (Metformin 500mg PR + Glimepiride) with Smartdose™ technology delivers superior glycaemic control — a clinically proven combination endorsed by endocrinologists and physicians across the AP coastal belt.

💊 Metformin PR + Glimepiride (Smartdose™) ✅ WHO GMP Certified 📍 All AP Districts Available 🏥 Endocrinologist Approved
💬 Enquire via WhatsApp All Franchise Info
Market Opportunity

Diabetes: AP's Largest Chronic Disease Market

Andhra Pradesh and Telangana have among the highest diabetes prevalence rates in India — a well-documented public health concern across both urban centres and semi-urban towns. This translates into one of the most consistent and high-volume prescription markets for antidiabetic medicines across the entire AP coastal belt.

Metformin-based combinations with Sulphonylureas remain the most widely prescribed class of oral antidiabetics in Indian general practice and endocrinology. A quality, WHO GMP certified Metformin + Glimepiride product with Smartdose PR technology commands strong repeat prescriptions once established in a territory.

  • AP has one of India's highest rates of type 2 diabetes — massive prescription volume
  • Metformin + Glimepiride is the most prescribed antidiabetic combination in AP GP practices
  • Prolonged-release (PR) Metformin improves GI tolerability — key differentiator
  • Endocrinologists, diabetologists, and GPs all prescribe this class heavily
  • Long-term chronic prescription — reliable repeat business for franchise partners
  • Strong demand across both metro and tier-2 AP markets
Diabetic Portfolio

Metsenim-G Series – Crasenim Pharma

Metsenim-G1 & Metsenim-G2
G1: Metformin 500mg PR + Glimepiride 1mg G2: Metformin 500mg PR + Glimepiride 2mg Technology: Smartdose™ WHO GMP Certified
Franchise Available

Clinical Indications

  • Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus with HbA1c > 9% (poorly controlled)
  • First-line or add-on dual oral antidiabetic therapy
  • Overweight/obese T2DM patients (Metformin component)
  • T2DM with high-normal HbA1c requiring sulphonylurea

Smartdose™ Clinical Advantages

  • Prolonged-release Metformin — significantly reduced GI side effects
  • Synergistic glycaemic control (Glimepiride + Metformin dual action)
  • Reduced hypoglycaemia risk vs higher-dose sulphonylurea monotherapy
  • Once-daily dosing improves patient compliance significantly
Franchise Opportunity

Take the Diabetic Range Franchise in Your AP District

PCD Franchise

Exclusive Diabetic Territory

Own the franchise rights for Metsenim-G in your district. Chronic, repeat-prescription product — once a patient is on it, they stay on it. Ideal for building a stable, growing franchise income.

Commission MR

Earn Per Diabetic Prescription

Promote Metsenim-G to endocrinologists and GPs in your area. Every patient stabilised on the drug generates monthly repeat prescription commission indefinitely.

Stockist

Diabetic Range Distribution

Stock Metsenim-G and ensure consistent supply to pharmacies. Diabetic medications have some of the most reliable demand in any pharmacy — guaranteed offtake.

FAQs

Diabetic Range Franchise – FAQ

What is the difference between Metsenim-G1 and Metsenim-G2?
Metsenim-G1 contains Metformin 500mg PR + Glimepiride 1mg (lower Glimepiride dose for patients requiring gentle sulphonylurea initiation). Metsenim-G2 contains Metformin 500mg PR + Glimepiride 2mg (for patients requiring stronger glycaemic control). Both use Smartdose™ technology for sustained drug release.
Why is Prolonged Release (PR) Metformin better for franchise?
PR Metformin has significantly fewer GI side effects (nausea, diarrhoea) compared to immediate-release Metformin. This improves patient compliance, reduces prescription switches, and makes it easier for franchise partners to retain doctor prescriptions over time.
Is the diabetic franchise available in Visakhapatnam, Vijayawada, and Kakinada?
Yes. Diabetic range franchise territories are available across all major AP districts including Visakhapatnam, Vijayawada, Kakinada, Rajahmundry, Eluru, and all other coastal belt districts. Contact us to confirm current availability in your specific area.
